reviews.review_msg: Professor Krallis was very passionate but his lectures were information heavy and difficult to follow. They were 2 hours full of information, that was difficult to remember and understand. His exams could be on anything from his lectures. My advice for the tests is to keep studying all the study questions for each week and keep up with readings.
He is too harsh with grading the exams. Though, the lectures seem to be interesting. This course is unique in which six different profs are lecturing in it.

He was one of several profs that simultaneously taught this course; I am glad that he didn't make this class buy any textbooks! But I struggled to complete a 15 minute quiz on the same day of a three hour lecture which felt overwhelming. I also didn't like his sarcasm since it made it difficult for me to learn.
